untranslatable_reason: Signal references undefined [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] placeholders and 'major bull campaign move' detection requires historical swing analysis not available in standard indicators. The exact retracement levels (23.6%, 38.2%, 50%, 61.8%) are not specified. Used pivot points (S1, pivot, R1) as proxy for support/retracement levels, but this is an approximation rather than a true implementation of Fibonacci retracement or Law of Proportion as intended.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_4 appears to reference retracement theory (possibly Fibonacci or Law of Proportion) but lacks specific threshold values. Translated conceptually using pivot point support (S1) and resistance (R1) levels as retracement proxies. A complete implementation would require: (1) identification of major bull move start/end points, (2) calculation of retracement percentages, and (3) threshold specifications. Entry assumes price retraces to support area between S1 and pivot; exit when price moves above R1 resistance.
